name: qortex-brand-system
description: Qortex brand book, design system, and template library — the qortex-brand skill.

scripts.test: npm run test:tokens && npm run email:build && npm run slides:export && npm run test:snapshots
scripts.snapshots:update: npm run email:build && npm run slides:export && node skills/qortex-brand/tools/test-snapshots.mjs --update
scripts.slides:export: cd skills/qortex-brand/templates/slides && npx slidev export sales-pitch.md --format png --range 1 --output dist/sales-pitch-en-slide-1 && npx slidev export sales-pitch-ja.md --format png --range 1 --output dist/sales-pitch-ja-slide-1
